0.FDO/Description.value: Defines the list of attribute definitions that MUST be instantiated in any FDO instantiating this profile. The cardinality of the attribute definitions MUST be respected in the FDOs. 0.FDO/Attribute is repeated at least three times, once with each of the values 0.FDO/Type, 0.FDO/Profile, 0.FDO/Data, because these are the mandatory attributes that MUST be contained in any FDO. Additional attributes can be added by further repeating the 0.FDO/Attribute with other values.
